content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Magic Powder - 1". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/670/problem/D1
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers representing the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a hashmap to store the frequency of each element in the array, then calculate the minimum number of operations required to make all elements equal.
